audit_items.proof_trace: The check at L135-137 enforces `address(order.buyToken) != s_assetOut → revert InvalidBuyToken` on the only code path that can return magicValue. The hash integrity check at L128-130 (`GPv2Order.hash(order, domainSeparator)`) cryptographically binds the committed hash to all order fields including `buyToken`, so an attacker cannot modify `buyToken` in the signature without invalidating the hash. No bypass path exists.
